scripts.dev: bun run dev:infra && bun --filter='catalyst-backend' --filter='catalyst-frontend' --parallel run dev --host
scripts.dev:infra: cd catalyst-docker && podman-compose up -d postgres redis || true
scripts.dev:all: bun run dev:infra && bun --filter='catalyst-backend' --filter='catalyst-frontend' --parallel run dev
scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:backend && bun run build:frontend
scripts.build:shared: echo 'catalyst-shared is types-only, nothing to build'
scripts.clean: rm -rf catalyst-backend/dist catalyst-backend/node_modules catalyst-frontend/dist catalyst-frontend/node_modules catalyst-shared/node_modules node_modules
